command: from pathlib import Path; paths=['docs/ai-workflow-release-signoff.md','docs/ai-workflow-incident-runbook.md']; [(_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError(p)) for p in paths if not Path(p).exists() or not Path(p).read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip()]; print('runbook-ok')

command: import yaml; [yaml.safe_load(open(p)) for p in ['.github/workflows/ai-workflow-release-signoff.yml','.github/workflows/ai-workflow-retention.yml','.github/workflows/eval.yml','.github/workflows/engine-eval.yml','.github/workflows/llm-live-eval.yml','infra/prometheus/rules/bgts-alerts.yml']]; print('yaml-ok')

compose_config_local
checks.stdout_tail:
HEADLESS: "true"
      MOBILE_ARTIFACTS_DIR: /app/mobile_uploads
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - curl -fsS http://localhost:5001/health || exit 1
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 20s
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 127.0.0.1
        target: 5001
        published: "5001"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: engine_data
        target: /app/reports
        volume: {}
      - type: volume
        source: engine_screenshots
        target: /app/screenshots
        volume: {}
      - type: volume
        source: engine_mobile_uploads
        target: /app/mobile_uploads
        volume: {}
  postgres:
    container_name: twai_postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: twai_db
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: twai_pass
      POSTGRES_USER: twai_user
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U twai_user -d twai_db
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 5432
        published: "5432"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: pgdata
        target: /var/lib/postgresql/data
        volume: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /Users/yasin_bulgan/Desktop/Neurex_QA/infra/postgres-init
        target: /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
  redis:
    container_name: twai_redis
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - ping
      timeout: 3s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
    image: redis:7-alpine
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 6379
        published: "6379"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
  web:
    build:
      context: /Users/yasin_bulgan/Desktop/Neurex_QA/apps/web
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: twai_web
    depends_on:
      backend:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
      engine:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    environment:
      API_PROXY_TARGET: http://backend:8000
      NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE: http://backend:8000
      NEXT_PUBLIC_ENGINE_BASE: http://engine:5001
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 3000
        published: "3000"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
  worker:
    build:
      context: /Users/yasin_bulgan/Desktop/Neurex_QA/backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    command:
      - sh
      - -c
      - rq worker -u $$REDIS_URL $$RQ_QUEUE_NAME
    container_name: twai_worker
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      ARTIFACTS_DIR: /app/data/artifacts
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+psycopg2://twai_user:twai_pass@postgres:5432/syndata_db
      ENGINE_BASE_URL: http://engine:5001
      ENGINE_INTERNAL_KEY: twai-internal-key-change-me
      JWT_SECRET: aDSp9Dy-k3dWKB6KlUos8og8oouU3BxAL0WJfiQMjd75J_Sjy2DneppLkGMELcUK1N19lgljIuP5Ws8qnyC39g
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0
      RQ_QUEUE_NAME: syndata_jobs
      SKIP_APP_BOOTSTRAP: "1"
    networks:
      default: null
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: backend_artifacts
        target: /app/data/artifacts
        volume: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: neurex_qa_default
volumes:
  backend_artifacts:
    name: neurex_qa_backend_artifacts
    driver: local
  engine_data:
    name: neurex_qa_engine_data
    driver: local
  engine_mobile_uploads:
    name: neurex_qa_engine_mobile_uploads
    driver: local
  engine_screenshots:
    name: neurex_qa_engine_screenshots
    driver: local
  pgdata:
    name: neurex_qa_pgdata
    driver: local

: /etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
        read_only: true

  redis:
    command:
      - redis-server
      - --requirepass
      - --maxmemory
      - 256mb
      - --maxmemory-policy
      - allkeys-lru
      - --save
      - "60"
      - "1000"
      - --appendonly
      - "yes"
    container_name: bgts_redis_prod
    expose:
      - "6379"
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - if [ -n "$${REDIS_PASSWORD}" ]; then redis-cli -a "$${REDIS_PASSWORD}" ping | grep PONG; else redis-cli ping | grep PONG; fi
      timeout: 3s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
    image: redis:7-alpine
    networks:
      bgts_internal: null
    restart: always
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: redis_data_prod
        target: /data
        volume: {}
  redis-exporter:
    container_name: bgts_redis_exporter
    depends_on:
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: 0.25
          memory: "134217728"
    environment:
      REDIS_ADDR: redis://redis:6379
      REDIS_PASSWORD: ""
    expose:
      - "9121"
    image: oliver006/redis_exporter:v1.61.0
    networks:
      bgts_internal: null
    restart: always
  web:

    depends_on:
      backend:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    deploy:

        limits:
          cpus: 1
          memory: "536870912"
    environment:

      NEXT_PUBLIC_ENGINE_BASE: http://127.0.0.1:5001
      NODE_ENV: production
    expose:
      - "3000"
    image: ghcr.io/bgts/bgts-web:latest
    networks:
      bgts_internal: null
    restart: always
  worker:
    command:
      - sh
      - -c
      - rq worker -u $$REDIS_URL $$RQ_QUEUE_NAME
    container_name: bgts_worker_prod
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    deploy:
      resources:

          cpus: 1
          memory: "536870912"
    environment:

      ARTIFACTS_DIR: /app/data/artifacts
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+psycopg2://bgts_user:3fc89fbf59b3c68f26cc78f3b2ecc18afbd19d995c8f8f9c@127.0.0.1:5432/syndata_db

      REDIS_URL: redis://127.0.0.1:6379/0

    image: ghcr.io/bgts/bgts-backend:latest
